name: SORLCUR
description: Student Curriculum repeating table to store level, college, program and other data associated with curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_PIDM
columns.description: PIDM: Unique internal ID for individual who has records in the system.

columns.name: SORLCUR_SEQNO
columns.description: LCUR SEQNO: One up number to define the row.

columns.name: SORLCUR_LMOD_CODE
columns.description: LEARNER MODULE CODE: Learner Module Code.

columns.name: SORLCUR_TERM_CODE
columns.description: TERM CODE: Term code.

columns.name: SORLCUR_KEY_SEQNO
columns.description: KEY SEQNO: Sequence number of key record, saradap_appl_no, srbrecr_seqno, shrdgmr_seqno, sgrstsp_key_seqno.

columns.name: SORLCUR_PRIORITY_NO
columns.description: PRIORITY NO: priority of the curriculum within the module.

columns.name: SORLCUR_ROLL_IND
columns.description: ROLL IND: Y/N indicator if the learner curriclum should roll to academic history when courses are rolled.

columns.name: SORLCUR_CACT_CODE
columns.description: CURRICULUM ACTIVITY STATUS: Activity status code for the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_USER_ID
columns.description: UPDATE USER ID: Most recent user to create or update the record.

columns.name: SORLCUR_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA SOURCE: Source system that generated the data

columns.name: SORLCUR_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: ACTIVITY DATE: The most recent date a record was created or updated

columns.name: SORLCUR_LEVL_CODE
columns.description: LEVEL CODE: Level code of the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_COLL_CODE
columns.description: COLLEGE CODE: college code of the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_DEGC_CODE
columns.description: DEGREE CODE: degree code of the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_TERM_CODE_CTLG
columns.description: TERM CATALOG: catalog term code of the learner curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_TERM_CODE_END
columns.description: TERM END: end term code of the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_TERM_CODE_MATRIC
columns.description: TERM MATRICULATED: term code learner matriculated into the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_TERM_CODE_ADMIT
columns.description: TERM ADMIT: term code learner was admitted to curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_ADMT_CODE
columns.description: ADMIT CODE: admit code for the learners admission to the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_CAMP_CODE
columns.description: CAMPUS CODE: campus code of the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_PROGRAM
columns.description: PROGRAM: program of the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_START_DATE
columns.description: START DATE: date curriculum starts.

columns.name: SORLCUR_END_DATE
columns.description: END DATE: date curriculum ends.

columns.name: SORLCUR_CURR_RULE
columns.description: CURRICULUM RULE NUMBER: rule number of the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_ROLLED_SEQNO
columns.description: ROLLED SEQNO: sorlcur_seqno of outcome created during the grade roll.

columns.name: SORLCUR_STYP_CODE
columns.description: LEARNER TYPE: This describes the type of student.

columns.name: SORLCUR_RATE_CODE
columns.description: RATE CODE: This is the fee assessment rate code.

columns.name: SORLCUR_LEAV_CODE
columns.description: LEAVE CODE: This describes the reason for the leave of absense.

columns.name: SORLCUR_LEAV_FROM_DATE
columns.description: LEAVE TO DATE: This is the end date of the leave.

columns.name: SORLCUR_LEAV_TO_DATE
columns.description: LEAVE FROM DATE: This is the start date of the leave.

columns.name: SORLCUR_EXP_GRAD_DATE
columns.description: EXPECTED GRADUATION DATE: This is the date the learner is expected to graduate from the curriculum.

columns.name: SORLCUR_TERM_CODE_GRAD
columns.description: EXPECTED GRADUATION TERM: This is the expected term the learner will graduate.

columns.name: SORLCUR_ACYR_CODE
columns.description: GRADUATION ACADEMIC YEAR: This is the academic year for the graduation.

columns.name: SORLCUR_SITE_CODE
columns.description: LEARNER SITE: This describes the site of student.

columns.name: SORLCUR_APPL_SEQNO
columns.description: APPLICATION SEQUENCE NUMBER: This is the sequence number of the application curriculum the learner curriculum was created from.

columns.name: SORLCUR_APPL_KEY_SEQNO
columns.description: APPLICATION NUMBER: This is the application number the learner curriculum was created from.

columns.name: SORLCUR_ACTIVITY_DATE_UPDATE
columns.description: UPDATE ACTIVITY DATE: Most recent date the record was updated.

columns.name: SORLCUR_GAPP_SEQNO
columns.description: GRADUATION SEQUENCE NUMBER: The sequence number of the graduation application.

columns.name: SORLCUR_CURRENT_CDE
columns.description: CURRENT INDICATOR: Will be Y if this is the current curriculum, NULL if not.

columns.name: SORLCUR_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: SORLCUR_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: SORLCUR_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: SORLCUR_GUID
columns.description: Learner Curriculum repeating Table Global Unique Identifier: Stores the global unique identifier for a student program object.

columns.name: SORLCUR_OUTCOME_GUID
columns.description: OUTCOME GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.
